summary: Iteration 29: P0 Ship & Vehicle Data Migration from CStone verified. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI working correctly - ships list displays CStone images and prices, ship detail page shows technical specs from Wiki API and purchase locations from CStone.

issues: React duplicate key warnings for ships with same name (Gladius Pirate, Hammerhead 2949 BIS, etc.) - cosmetic, does not affect functionality. Pre-existing from iteration 28.

passed_tests: Backend: Ships have CStone fields - cstone_id, cstone_image, sold_in_game, rentable, role
Backend: Ships have purchase_details with per-location prices from CStone (56 ships have location data)
Backend: Ships have Wiki API specs - max_speed, crew_min, crew_max, health, shield_hp, hardpoints, quantum
Backend: Avenger Titan has sold_in_game=true, cstone_id, price_auec=1,290,366, purchase_locations
Backend: /api/vehicles returns 'cstone+live' source with 12 ground vehicles
Backend: Vehicles have CStone data fields
Backend: Register and login endpoints working with username (not email)
Frontend: Login page loads and authenticates correctly
Frontend: Ships page displays ship cards with images and prices
Frontend: Ship cards show CStone prices (1,508,220 aUEC for Avenger Stalker)
Frontend: Ship detail page loads with technical specifications
Frontend: Ship detail shows Wiki API specs - SCM Speed, Shield HP, Mass, etc.
Frontend: Purchase locations section displayed on ship detail page
Frontend: Search filtering works (searched 'Avenger', found 4 variants)
critical_code_review_comments: React duplicate key warning: Ships with identical names cause duplicate keys in list rendering. Consider using unique ship ID instead of name for React keys (pre-existing issue from iteration 28).
CStone data integration working correctly - ship purchase locations are fetched via background task on startup and cached
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users for backend tests: cstone_test_pilot_29, cstone_ships_test_29, cstone_vehicles_test_29, etc.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 verified P0 Ship & Vehicle Data Migration from CStone (finder.cstone.space). Ships now have CStone fields: cstone_id, cstone_image, sold_in_game, rentable, role, purchase_details with per-location prices. Wiki API provides: max_speed, crew_min, crew_max, health, shield_hp, hardpoints, quantum. 56 out of 204 ships have purchase_details populated (background task fetches locations for sold ships). All endpoints (/api/ships, /api/vehicles, /api/components, /api/weapons, /api/missiles, /api/item-locations) return CStone data with correct source indicators.
